item.woc_remastered.good_to_know.descrip: - Getting Started? First you can press "Shift" while your mouse points at Cataclysm's Weapon so you will see description about how the combos look like and how to perform them. Second, you may look into "Invincible Keys", right? You can find it in the keybinds setting!
§oTake it in your adventure... slay them across the star!

- Description: This mod is Epic Fight / Weapons of Miracles x L_Ender's Cataclysm compat to turn Every single Cataclysmic Weaponry to fight like bosses along with and some custom stuffs (Custom Animations, Content,...) made by me and The Memesmeller's Creativity by cooking his ideas on Invincible Combos, also breadbright for his idea and giving me some of textures (Souls Incinerator/Stuffs,...) when i don't have much time on making textures!

- This Mod Tab contains custom stuff made between Epic Fight and L_Ender's Cataclysm, include Custom Skill Books, New Skill Categories (Cataclysmic Arts),... If you looking for weapons moveset checkout at Cataclysm Items (Tab)
§e§l+ Into The Fire:§f §eThe Incinerator | §eThe Incinerator + Bulwark of The Flame | §6Infernal Forge | §dVoid Forge
§7§l+ Two Curses Rising:§f §7Dual Annihilators + Soul Render §f| §eSandstorm in the bottles (Dual) | §6The Immolator (Dual)
§b§l+ Up to Sky, Down to Sea:§f §dCeraunus §f| §5Tidal Claw (Both Single + Dual)
item.woc_remastered.wocr_icon.descriptio: Collecting powerful Cataclysmic's weapons, slay anyone like bosses
skill.blue_ignitium.souls_phase.tooltip: Enter the souls phase, The Incinerator glows blue along with Ignitium Armors Set. Blocking all attacks while attacking your enemies (Kill 1 mob regains 4 sec)
skill.woc_remastered.abyssal_claw.toolti: §5Tidal Claw §fis well used in both land and sea by eliminating blind spots in frontal combat. With only one set of jaws, the attacks are more out reaching but limited to forward facing strikes as well as shear abyssal firepower.
§5§lLaser Strikes:§f Summon row of abyss blast portal in front of player, aiming at target only summon 1 abyss blast portal but dealing x2 damage §b(Cooldown: 10s / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY3 + KEY4]
§d-> Shoot:§f Shoot out tidal hook with further range and higher velocity §b[KEY4]
§d-> Pull:§f While pull yourself in the tidal hook path, press KEY4 again to pull forward and cancel tidal hook. This seems risky unless you want to use this for a BOOST
§5Melee Autos:§f Tearing and spinning attacks §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§5Swirl-Claw:§f Spin Attack, can perform in mid-air §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3]
§5Burning Claw:§f Knockdown the burnt target with abyssal firepower §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3]
§5Duplex Tide Slash:§f Tidal Charging forward then Swirl-Claw §b[Dash Attack + KEY1]
§5Abyss-Catcher:§f Heavy stun but don't deal much damage, successful hit send 2 extra abyss tentacles targeting nearby opponent §b[Long Press KEY1 + KEY1]
§5§lAbyssal Blaster:§f Shoot an abyss blast §b(No Cooldown / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY3 + KEY3]
skill.woc_remastered.abyssal_claw_gb.too: §5Tidal Claw §fis well used in both land and sea by eliminating blind spots in frontal combat. Instead of wielding one like a set of jaws, using both are like tendrils that surrounds the main head. With two maws full of abyssal energy, the user could utilize more range attacks and faster melees as long as the target is in grappling range.
§5§lDeath Beam of Deepsea:§f Pushing nearby enemies that too close, start charging an energy ball then blasting DEATH LASER dealing damage rapidly §b(Cooldown: 24s / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY1_2]
§5Melee Autos:§f Aggressive basic attacks §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§5Clamping Laser-Shot:§f Grasp enemy then backflip laser shot §b[KEY1 + KEY3 + KEY3]
§5Tide Slasher:§f Tidal Charging forward then Wind Slashes §b[Dash Attack + KEY1]
§5-> Abyss Mines Placer:§f Summoning bunch of floating abyss mines around player, effective when underwater §b(No Cooldown / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY1]
§5-> Burnt & Glowing Roar:§f Cause darkness effect to nearby living entity, created bunch of abyss orbs which chase nearby opponents §b(Cooldown: 8s / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY2]
§5-> Abyssal Blaster:§f Shoot an abyss blast, having maximum stacks will only consume 1 stack §b(No Cooldown / Consume 2 Stack) [KEY3]
§5-> Orbital Strikes:§f Spawning multiple abyss blast portal around player in 20 radius, aiming at target will spawn extra portal to nearby them §b(Cooldown: 12s / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY4]
skill.woc_remastered.flame_avatar.toolti: §eThe Incinerator §fis medium-heavy fiery sword. By its large size, This §eBlazing Blade §fcan take down any heavy enemy with high armor points, pierce and weaker their armor with §6Flame of Hell §fpower
§6Melee Autos:§f Basic swing to slasher §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§6Pushing Puncture:§f Pierce your enemy then push them away §b[Dash Attack + KEY3 + KEY3]
§6Overheating Uppercut:§f Slash down and grilled opponents with high AOE damage §b[§6Melee Autos§b + KEY3 + KEY3]
§6Blade-swing to Fireballs:§f Call 3 Ignis Fireballs by your sword to target nearest enemy §b(Cooldown: 2s / Required at least 1 stack) [KEY3]

§6§lSpark Concussion §e(Combo):§f Flaming Leap forward -> Stomp the sword dealing high AOE Damage creating 3 Ignis Fireball targeting nearby opponents §b(Cooldown: 10s / Consume 1 Stack) [§6Blade-swing to Fireball§b + KEY1 + KEY1]
§6§lConjure: Arc of Fireballs:§f Call 4 Normal Ignis Fireballs and 1 Abyss One targeting nearest enemies §b(Cooldown: 15s / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY4 + KEY3]

§6§lBurning Judgement:§f Standing at position you were, starting to perform skill -> creating forward row of flame strikes and burning nearby enemies that nearby you §b(Cooldown: 25s / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY1_2]

§b§lAzure Flames of Souls:§f Entering §bSouls Phase§f, glowing §eThe Incinerator§f along with §eIgnitium Armors Set§f into Souls Flame. When in §bSouls Phase:§f Damage | Armor Negation | Knockback Resistance | Max Stamina buffed, Life-Steal: Every single successfully attack will heal you (Greater), §e25s duration §fand§e every mob killed gains §b5s duration§f, Enhanced Ignis Fireballs and Flame Strikes §b(No Cooldown / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY4 + KEY4]
skill.woc_remastered.flame_avatar_k.tool: With §eThe Bulwark of The Flame§f on other hand, giving benefits to §eThe Incinerator§f not only long-range high damage but also block against heavy upcoming attacks. Despite being slower than two-hand style, §eThe Incinerator and Its Friend §fcan be powerful at AoE and bashing opponent forced them to fallback...
§6Melee Autos:§f Simple one-handed swings §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§6Bashing Puncture:§f Pierce your enemy then push them away §b[Dash Attack + KEY3 + KEY3]
§6Shield-Basher:§f Pushes enemies away then pierce them §b[KEY3 + KEY3 + KEY1]
§6Reinforced Shield-Basher:§f Stronger shield bash -> pierce of §6Shield-Basher §b(No Cooldown / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY3 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§6Blade-swing to Fireballs:§f Call 3 Ignis Fireballs by your sword to target nearest enemy §b(Cooldown: 2s / Required at least 1 stack) [Hold KEY2 + KEY3]

§6§lSpark Concussion §e(Combo):§f Shield Smash on the ground -> Stomp the sword dealing high AOE Damage creating 3 Ignis Fireball targeting nearby opponents §b(Cooldown: 10s / Consume 1 Stack) [§6Blade-swing to Fireball§b + KEY1 + KEY1]
skill.woc_remastered.flame_piercer.toolt: Press [%s] to perform an Ignis Poke. Successfully hit results a heavy thrust pierce through, holding enemy in blade, weaken their armors and rapidly dealing damage §l- (Consume %.1f stamina | Cooldown: %.1fs) [Weapons Category Available: Greatsword, Longsword]
skill.woc_remastered.flame_piercer_alt.t: *NOTE: This skill is for "soft" compat between WOCR and Epic Skill Tree, learn it in "Passive 1" once learned you can remove it for more slot and the original skill will remain. If you want to see more information please read it in Flame Piercer (Cataclysmic Arts)
skill.woc_remastered.ghastly_grasp.toolt: Press [%s] to flying forward. Successfully hit will grab the enemy up then fly down slammed enemy along with large AoE Ghost-Fire Explosion, ignored 50% armor - (Consume %.1f stamina | Cooldown: %.1fs)
skill.woc_remastered.ghastly_grasp_alt.t: *NOTE: This skill is for "soft" compat between WOCR and Epic Skill Tree, learn it in "Passive 1" once learned you can remove it for more slot and the original skill will remain. If you want to see more information please read it in Ghastly Grasp (Cataclysmic Arts)
skill.woc_remastered.infernal_awoken.too: §eInfernal Forge §fis used to knock enemies down to take advantage of attacks that hit down target, crushing them repeatedly, or knocking foes away to avoid retaliation
§6§lMolten Throw: §fLaunches 3 Lava Bombs §b(Consume: 1 Stack / Cooldown: 5s) [KEY4 + KEY4]
§eStable Fortress (Passive): §fEvery single attack cannot be interrupted by enemy's attacks
§6Melee autos: §fBasic stun to knockdown §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§6JackHammer Pulse: §fKnock targets away §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3]
§6Roaring Uppercutting: §fBurnt down targets or nearby enemies §b[§6Melee autos §b+ KEY3]
§6Shoulder Charge -> Golem Uppercut: §fGlorified Charge Attack then knock enemies up §b[Airslash + KEY1]
§6Merciless Crumple: §fHit down targets then knock them away §b[Dash Attack + KEY1 + KEY1]
§6Golem Juggle: §fHit targets in the air then knock 'em away §b[KEY4 + KEY4 + KEY4]
§6Reusable Refuel:§f Detecting nearby lava sources by 8x8 area, consume them into energy which charges up Skill §e( + 50 Consumption/Energy for each lava consumed) §b[KEY4 + KEY3]
§6Flare Throw:§f An Alternative Shoot of 'Molten Throw', shoot out 3 Flare Bombs §b(Required At least 1 Stack / Cooldown: 7.5s [KEY3 + KEY3]

§6§lMonstrosites Fall: §fOverheated the Hammer will charge its attack, impact the ground created flame jets to rise up and burn down surrounded enemies §b(Cooldown: 10s / Consume: 1 Stack) [KEY3 + KEY1]

§6§lMonsterous Roar: §fCause a shockwave of stun and gain fire resistance, monstrous §e(Strategy: When roaring you have short time of Invulnerable, use this to counter some enemy's attacks) §b[KEY3 + KEY2]
The same as §eInfernal Forge§f, §dVoid Forge §fis used to knock enemies down, crushing them repeatly,...
§dRoaring Uppercutting: §fShattered targets with rising void runes §b[§6Melee autos §b+ KEY3]
§dReusable Refuel:§f Detecting nearby lava sources by 8x8 area, consume them into energy which charges up Skill §e( + 1 Stack for each lava consumed) §b[KEY4 + KEY3]

§d§lGuardian Fall: §fOverheated the Hammer will charge its attack, impact the ground created void runes to rise up and deal high damage surrounded enemies §b(Cooldown: 10s / Consume: 1 Stack) [KEY3 + KEY1]
§6§lMolten & §dVoided Throw: §fLaunches 2 Lava Bombs and 1 Void Howitzer §b(Consume: 1 Stack / Cooldown: 5s) [KEY3 + KEY3]
skill.woc_remastered.rising_wings.toolti: §7Souls-Connection (Passive):§f Seems like The Annihilators and Soul Render have something connecting them together §o§e"They  alway cover with each others"§r§f, with this friendship, both of the weapons shared the same §7Souls §f(Stacks) and §7Energy §f(Consumption) §o§7"Souls are kept inside of Two when Energy at zero or Souls are fullified, the Energy cannot keep them any longer making Soul's Freedom if weapon is switched. Souls are only fading away when their Owner dies or revisits the world"
§7Melee Autos:§f Heavy attacks to rushing attacks §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§7Windup Slash:§f Fast swing causes long stun and khock enemy away §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3]
§7Overhead Swing -> Heavy Knockback Swing:§f Long-ranged and Deadly forces enemy to backward §b[Dash Attack + KEY1]
§7Guard Counter:§f Uppercut counter for close range §b[Long press KEY1]
§7Air-Strike Halberd:§f Disappeared on ground, surprising attack! §b[KEY3 + KEY1]
§7§lOverhead Jump-Slam:§f Boosted overhead slam breaks your opponent helm §b[§7Melee Autos§b + KEY3]

§7§lMalevolent Swoop (Combos):§f Rising up -> flying down toward enemies, first attack creating Spiral Phantom Halberds around player, second attack creating Ring of Phantom Halberds strike through enemies around §b(No Cooldown / Consume 1 Stack for Each) [KEY3 + KEY3 (+ KEY1)]
§7§lCursed Rush:§f Charging your momentum -> pierce through all of enemies in the path. You can charge 2 times consume 1 stack for each §b(No Cooldown / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY2/Guard + KEY3 (+ KEY1)]

§7§lPhantom Death Field:§f Strikes The Halberd down does "absolutely" no damage but can knock enemies away, then swing that creating a sea of Phantom Halberds in front of player §b(Cooldown: 15s / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY4 + KEY4]
§7§lWhen held Dual Annihilators: §r§7Heavy, yet fast; a good combo weapon that can rack up damage but can leave the user vulnerable if careless
§7Melee Autos:§f Two-handed swing to heavy slasher §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§7Two-handed Jump-Slam:§f Acts as weaker Cursed Slam, smashed opponent's head §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3]
§7Dashing Thrown-Up -> Simple Swing:§f Uppercut then swing offhand's mace §b[Dash Attack + KEY1]
§7Guarded Maces Counter:§f Melee Autos but only included 2 last attacks §b[Long Press KEY1 + KEY1]
§7§lCharged Airslam of Curse:§f Rising up -> flying down toward enemies, causing large AOE earthquake and create 5 Phantom Axe-Blades forward §b(Cooldown: 3s / Consume 1 stack) [KEY3 + KEY1]

§7§lMaledictio's Battle Cry:§f With the power of ghost fire creating explosion of cursed flame in 6.5 radius, ignored 50% Armor  and phantom axe-blades around the caster, after explosion giving 5s of resistance and stun armor §b[Cooldown: 12s / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY4]
§7§lWhen held Soul Render: §r§7Stronger, more flashy, and slower than it's counterpart. Rewards the user to not miss every meaty attack.
§eSandstorm in a Bottle:§f A jack of all traits, of close to mid range brute force. Some attacks can be described as using §ethe flow of sand§f to cut enemies, other attacks may look more like §ebrutal flesh-ripping monster

§e§lAncient Roar of the Prehistoric:§f Causes heavy stun, gives 3 second stun immunity. It cost one skill stack but every attack after it doesn't cost anything. The user must be quick which special should they use §b(No Cooldown / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY3]
§e§lMeaty Bite:§f Deal massive damage, knockdown enemy, successfully hit will fill up your hunger bar and saturation §b(No Cooldown) [KEY3 + KEY1]
§e§lOrbiting Sandstorms:§f Summon 3 Sandstorms around the owner rotating in 15s §b(Cooldown: 6s) [KEY3 + KEY2]
§e§lParched Breath:§f Breaths out a stream of sandstorm projectile §e(No Cooldown) [KEY3 + KEY3]
§e§lSpiral Sand Steles:§f Summon a spiral of Sand Tombs with one straight line of it in front of the target §b(Cooldown: 12s) [KEY3 + KEY4]
§e§lRemnant's Stomps:§f Causing wave of earthquakes in front of the owner dealing high AoE Damage (No Cooldown / Consume 1 Stack for Each Attack) §b[KEY4 (+ KEY4)]
§eMelee Autos:§f Claw of sands wiped them! §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§eSpino's Maul:§f Low range but successfully attack results enemy to knockdown §b[KEY1 + KEY3]
§eSand's Uppercut:§f A quick attack §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3]
§eRemnant's Tail Slam:§f Slow attack, good at AOE, impact the ground created earthquake waving around §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3]
§eCharge 'n Knock Up:§f Push them away then knock 'em up §b[Dash Attack + KEY1]
§eRoaring Charge:§f A rush of the monster hitting every enemy on the path §b[KEY2/Guard + KEY3]
§eWindwhirl Dance:§f Spinning jump attack with 3 sandstorms around the caster during the animation, when animation ends burst them away and around §b[Jump + KEY4]
§eSteles Fall:§f Acts as weaker roar, spawn 1 line of Sand Tombs in front of opponent §b[Dash Attack KEY4 / Sprint + KEY4]
Turn your weapon trail into blue-fiery trail (Why i made this? Just to customize)
§6The Immolators§f belong to the Annihilators side - A Heavy, yet fast, good combo weapons... but different from its brother, its power is charged up by Ignitium giving many benefits on its weakness to §e"Melt Their Armory"
§6§lConjure: Arc of Fireballs:§f Call 2 Normal Ignis Fireballs and 1 Abyss One targeting nearest enemies §b(Cooldown: 10s / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY4 + KEY3]

§6§lBattle Cry - Born in Fire:§f With the power of the awoken fire creating explosion of flame in 6.5 radius, ignored 50% Armor and create earthquake area around caster from 6.0 -> 10.0 radius, after explosion giving 10s of resistance and stun armor §b[Cooldown: 16s / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY1_2]

§b§lAzure Flames of Souls:§f Entering §bSouls Phase§f, glowing §eThe Immolators§f along with §eIgnitium Armors Set§f into Souls Flame. When in §bSouls Phase:§f Movement Speed | Attack Speed | Stamina Regen | Impact buffed, Life-Steal: Every single successfully attack will heal you (Lesser), §e25s duration §fand§e every mob killed gains §b9s duration§f, Enhanced Ignis Fireballs and Flame Strikes §b(No Cooldown / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY4 + KEY4]
§6Melee Autos:§f Two-handed swing to heavy slasher §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§6Two-handed Jump-Slam:§f Acts as weaker "Cursed Slam", smashed opponent's head §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3]
§6Dashing Thrown-Up -> Simple Swing:§f Uppercut then swing offhand's mace §b[Dash Attack + KEY1]
§6Guarded Maces Counter:§f Melee Autos but only included 2 last attacks §b[Long Press KEY1 + KEY1]
§6Quick Slashes:§f From swinging both hand to pierce through armor §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3 + KEY3]
§6Overheating Uppercut: Grilled opponent along with small earthquake wave in front of owner §b[§6Melee Autos§b + KEY3]
§6§lCharged Airslam of Flame:§f Rising up -> flying down toward enemies, causing large AOE earthquake and create flame jets forward §b(Cooldown: 3s / Required at least 1 Stack) [KEY3 + KEY1]
§6§lSpark Concussion §e(Combo):§f Rising up to sky -> Stomp the mace down creating 3 Ignis Fireball targeting nearby opponents §b(Cooldown: 10s / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY3 + KEY3 + KEY1]
skill.woc_remastered.tidal_electricity.t: Despite once wielded by an agile warrior, §dCeraunus §fis slow and heavy. However, instead of pure force or light weight size, this anchor's conductibility allows the control of electricity better than other elements. This and the combination of the user's strength and the weapon's weight allows unexpected mobility along with lightning to cover up range combat.
§b-> Anchor Throw:§f Throwing Ceraunus forward where player look at §b(Cooldown: 3s / No Consume) [KEY1]
§b-> Reinforce Anchor Throw:§f Deal more damage, hook target then pull §b(No Cooldown / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY2]
§b-> Awaken Tide Serpents:§f Call 2-4 Storm Serpents around caster targeting nearby enemies (Cooldown: 8s / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY3]

§b-> Thunder 'o Lightning:§f Summon whirlpool around push nearby enemies, start conjuring the storm that call down rain of   lightning spears toward to target §f§o(Aiming at opponent to summon lightning, otherwise, it won't) §b(Cooldown: 14s / Consume 2 Stacks) [KEY4]
§b->§f Throw single water spear, repeat this attack depend on how many skill stack you have §b(Required at least 1 Stack) [KEY1]
§b->§f Throw single lightning spear, repeat this attack depend on how many skill stack you have §b(Required at least 1 Stack) [KEY2]
§b->§f Throw 3-5 Water Spears, Number of Spears depend on how many skill stack you have §b(Required at least 3 Stacks) [KEY3]
§b->§f Throw 3-5 Lightning Spears, Number of Spears depend on how many skill stack you have §b(Required at least 3 Stacks) [KEY4]
§bMelee Autos:§f Basic swings and slam §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1]
§bSlam Wetness:§f Slam the anchor creating a tidal wave forward §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3 / Dash Attack + KEY3]
§bSlam Conductor:§f Heavy Slam, knockdown enemies and scatter electric sparks §b[KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY1 + KEY3 / Dash Attack + KEY1 + KEY3]
§bSteel Stormy:§f High impact, slow, create mini whirlpool pushed targets that are too close §b[Long Press KEY1]
§b-> Light on Sight:§f Create line of lightnings at nearest target position §b(No Cooldown / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY3 + (KEY3)]
§b-> Drown Them:§f Summon water waves in front of player §b(Cooldown: 7s / Consume 1 Stack) [KEY4]
§b§lAnchoring Thunderbolt:§f Throw anchor, impact the ground result pulling player to anchor position on ground created explosion of lightning §b(Cooldown: 15s / Consume 2 Stack) [Jump + KEY3 + KEY3]
